title: corybas saprophyticus
intro: Corybas saprophyticus, commonly known as the Australian ground orchid, is a rare and endangered species of orchid native to Australia. It is a type of saprophytic orchid, which means it obtains its nutrients by breaking down organic matter in the soil rather than through photosynthesis. The medicinal properties of Corybas saprophyticus include its ability to stimulate the immune system and exhibit antibacterial properties, making it a potential treatment for various infections. Herbal preparations of Corybas saprophyticus include extracts and tinctures that can be used to promote wound healing and reduce inflammation.
